no-device-msg: Sorry, you haven't bound any device yet
redeem-introduce-value: The package will not affect the use of the existing package after redemption. We will use this package to redemption after using your package.
tip-item1: 1. Please enter the correct redemption code. Withdrawal is unpermitted after redemption.
tip-item2: 2. Each redemption code can only be used on one device. Please select the device you want to operate on, Withdrawal is unpermitted after redemption.
